entries.speaker: Elder Rowan
entries.text: You finally arrived. The shrine has been restless all morning.

entries.speaker: Elder Rowan
entries.text: Will you inspect the altar now?

entries.speaker: Elder Rowan
entries.text: Good. Keep your guard up and trust your instincts.

entries.speaker: Elder Rowan
entries.text: Take your time. Return when your resolve is steady.
